name: Shift Host Node
postCreateCommand: until curl -fsSL "$GATEWAY_URL/api/internal/download-agent" -o agent.js; do echo 'Waiting for Gateway...'; sleep 5; done && sudo npm install -g pm2
postStartCommand: bash -c 'while ! docker info > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done; pm2 start /workspaces/dlxs-agent/agent.js --name shift-agent'
